subparts.text: State the role of economics for businesses. 2.5
Explain the role of Opportunity cost for a producer in economy. 2.5
“The theory of supply and demand is the main pillar of microeconomics.” Justify this relationship with your comment 2.5
What is Cross elasticity of demand? Elucidate with example. 2.5
Discuss the concept of Production function. 2.5
What type of assumptions are followed in law of variable proportions? 2.5
Differentiate between Explicit cost and Implicit cost. 2.5

questions.question_text: Define Business economics? Explain the nature and scope of Business economics in today’s rapidly changing environment.
How can economics contribute to businesses? Illustrate the applications of Economics in Business using industry examples.

“Demand is the ability and willingness to buy a specific quantity of a good at alternative prices in a given period of time, ceteris paribus.” Justify the given statement and analyze the various types of demand using relevant schedules and curves.
Critically evaluate the law of diminishing marginal utility citing suitable diagrams.
Discuss the relationship between Average, Marginal and Total Product using suitable diagrams.
What is production function? Explain short run production analysis in detail.
What is cost function? Demonstrate the role of different types of costs in determining the output prices.
Explain how a firm attains equilibrium in the short run under Monopolistic competition.
